title: Zebra Pen Z Grip Black Ballpoint Pens with Pocket Clip 8pk, Retractable Black Ink Ballpoint Pens, Reliable Black Biro Pens Multipack for Everyday Use Design, New Pack Size 8pk
features: SMOOTH WRITING: These ZEBRA Pen Z Grip Biro Pens are the perfect tool for your writing. With the silky smooth, low viscosity ink you will be able to write quickly on any paper without having to worry about the ink skipping.
EXTRA COMFORT: These retractable Ballpoint Pens are fitted with a specially designed comfort-ridged grip to make it easy on your fingers. You’ll be able to write for hours on end, day after day.
RELIABLE EVERYDAY WRITING: The writing pens that make up this pens multipack deliver on all fronts - style, comfort and performance. Use these ballpoint pens every day - they won’t let you down.

INCREDIBLE VALUE: These Black Pens are part of your essential office supplies and are proof that you don’t need to compromise when it comes to getting value for money. Use ballpoint pens that you can trust, without breaking the bank

EXPLORE YOUR CREATIVITY: At ZEBRA, we guarantee quality, satisfaction and ultimate writing performance. We empower people to fully capture and express the moments in life that are most important to them.
description: The ZEBRA Z-Grip Retractable Ballpoint Pen is our bestselling favourite. With a comfort grip and stainless steel pocket clip, ideal for homework, journaling, correspondence and notes. Available in 6 different colours for easy colour coding. Enjoy this ballpoint for your everyday writing needs.
